Bash(cd /c/Adhithya/Lineage/Backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import redis
r = redis.Redis\(host='localhost', port=6379, db=0\)
r.ping\(\)
keys = r.keys\('*'\)
print\(f'Redis is up. Cached keys: {len\(keys\)}'\)
from collections import Counter
if keys:
    prefixes = [k.decode\(\).split\(':'\)[0] for k in keys[:200]]
    for p, c in Counter\(prefixes\).most_common\(10\):
        print\(f'  {p}: {c}'\)
" 2>&1)
